_comment: Spine animation configuration for PvZ-Portable. Edit values and restart game — no recompile needed.

animations._anchorNote: The bone that sits at SetPosition() position. bone2 = body/frontleaf area.
animations._offsetNote: Positive Y pushes animation DOWN on screen. Positive X pushes RIGHT.
animations._bulletNote: Bone used as gun muzzle for bullet spawn. bone10 = head/gun area.
